title: Subitems people column
excerpt: SubItems inheriting the “People” Column with the assigned person from the parent item already populated or an automation to do so. I have different people assigned so the current automation makes me pick a specific perso…

posts.author: Tmichalik (Todd Michalik)
posts.cookedHtml: SubItems inheriting the “People” Column with the assigned person from the parent item already populated or an automation to do so. I have different people assigned so the current automation makes me pick a specific person and not the person the item is assigned to.

posts.author: emount (Evan)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would greatly help our teams. One team in particular has an automation that creates 30 subitems whenever an item is created in a board. The team needs the subitems to automatically be assigned to the same person as the parent item, but in order to accomplish this, they have to create a separate automation for each person within the board and they have to update the assignee in each of the 30 subitems to be created within the automation.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tmichalik & @emount,

We developed an app that solves this exact pain point of subitems inherting column value from parent. It’s called Subitem Automations and it allows to do this on subitem creation and when the parent item changes, here’s an example -

On creation - Populate item’s data into its subitems in a seamless way

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.31.152226×400 30.1 KB

On change - Being able to set dependency between a subitem to an item

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.30.162106×432 27.6 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
